_comment: Dynamic knowledge story engine. Each watcher run picks ONE topic (category rotation + 30-day no-repeat dedup, window-seeded) and asks Gemini to narrate it as a multi-paragraph story (see notify_watcher/topics/learn.py _generate_story). No bodies are stored here — only the topic prompts. Add topics by appending strings to any category; keep at least 50 per category, 10 categories. Category keys are stable ids; renaming one resets its 30-day dedup memory.
